title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: members, contributors, leaders pledge make participation community harassment-free experience everyone, regardless age, body size, visible invisible disability, ethnicity, sex characteristics, gender identity expression, level experience, education, socio-economic status, nationality, personal appearance, race, caste, color, religion, sexual identity orientation. pledge act interact ways contribute open, welcoming, diverse, inclusive, healthy community.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Examples behavior contributes positive environment community include: Demonstrating empathy kindness toward people respectful differing opinions, viewpoints, experiences Giving gracefully accepting constructive feedback Accepting responsibility apologizing affected mistakes, learning experience Focusing best just us individuals, overall community Examples unacceptable behavior include: use sexualized language imagery, sexual attention advances kind Trolling, insulting derogatory comments, personal political attacks Public private harassment Publishing others’ private information, physical email address, without explicit permission conduct reasonably considered inappropriate professional setting

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community leaders responsible clarifying enforcing standards acceptable behavior take appropriate fair corrective action response behavior deem inappropriate, threatening, offensive, harmful. Community leaders right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct, communicate reasons moderation decisions appropriate.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct applies within community spaces, also applies individual officially representing community public spaces. Examples representing community include using official e-mail address, posting via official social media account, acting appointed representative online offline event.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behavior may reported community leaders responsible enforcement maurolepore@gmail.com. complaints reviewed investigated promptly fairly. community leaders obligated respect privacy security reporter incident.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community leaders follow Community Impact Guidelines determining consequences action deem violation Code Conduct:

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: Use inappropriate language behavior deemed unprofessional unwelcome community. Consequence: private, written warning community leaders, providing clarity around nature violation explanation behavior inappropriate. public apology may requested.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: violation single incident series actions. Consequence: warning consequences continued behavior. interaction people involved, including unsolicited interaction enforcing Code Conduct, specified period time. includes avoiding interactions community spaces well external channels like social media. Violating terms may lead temporary permanent ban.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: serious violation community standards, including sustained inappropriate behavior. Consequence: temporary ban sort interaction public communication community specified period time. public private interaction people involved, including unsolicited interaction enforcing Code Conduct, allowed period. Violating terms may lead permanent ban.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: Demonstrating pattern violation community standards, including sustained inappropriate behavior, harassment individual, aggression toward disparagement classes individuals. Consequence: permanent ban sort public interaction within community.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant, version 2.1, available https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct.html. Community Impact Guidelines inspired [Mozilla’s code conduct enforcement ladder][https://github.com/mozilla/inclusion]. answers common questions code conduct, see FAQ https://www.contributor-covenant.org/faq. Translations available https://www.contributor-covenant.org/translations.

code: library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE) # Use dverse and the universe of packages you want to document library(dverse) library(tools) library(datasets) universe <- c("datasets", "tools") (defaults to showing the underlying URL) pick |> DT::datatable(escape = FALSE)

title: dverse
text: meta-package may organize documentation entire universe single place, maybe organized package concept (via #' @family). may create custom tables DT packages. Datasets available data() Documentation tools
code: custom_table <- function(data, search = "") {   DT::datatable(     data,     escape = FALSE,     rownames = NULL,     options = list(       # fti =  f: filter, t: table, i: information       dom = "fti", search = list(search = search)     )   ) } by_concept <- filter(pick, concept == "Datasets available by data()")  by_concept |> custom_table(search = "car") by_package <- filter(pick, package == "tools")  by_package |> custom_table(search = "Utilities")

title: dverse
text: meta-package, may use dverse article, use override default Reference component. example see pkgdown Reference dverse follow link source see ’s configured _pkgdown.yml.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Mauro Lepore. Author, contractor, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Lepore M (2024). dverse: Document Universe Packages. R package version 0.0.0.9003, https://maurolepore.github.io/dverse/, https://github.com/maurolepore/dverse.
code: @Manual{,   title = {dverse: Document a Universe of Packages},   author = {Mauro Lepore},   year = {2024},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9003,     https://maurolepore.github.io/dverse/},   url = {https://github.com/maurolepore/dverse}, }

title: Document a Universe of Packages
text: goal dverse make easy create data frame metadata associated documentation collection R packages. maintain R-package universe, helps easily create universe-wide reference pkgdown website meta-package (e.g. tidyverse, tidymodels).

title: Document a Universe of Packages
code: # Use dverse and the universe of packages you want to document library(dverse) library(tools) library(datasets)  universe <- c("datasets", "tools") url_template <- "https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/{package}/versions/3.6.2/topics/{topic}.html" linked <- document_universe(universe, url_template = url_template) linked #> # A tibble: 228 × 5 #>    topic                                             alias title concept package #>    <chr>                                             <chr> <chr> <chr>   <chr>   #>  1 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… .pri… Prin… Utilit… tools   #>  2 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… Adob… Conv… Datase… tools   #>  3 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… AirP… Mont… Datase… datase… #>  4 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… BJsa… Sale… Datase… datase… #>  5 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… BOD   Bioc… Datase… datase… #>  6 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… CO2   Carb… Datase… datase… #>  7 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… CRAN… CRAN… <NA>    tools   #>  8 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… Chic… Weig… Datase… datase… #>  9 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… DNase Elis… Datase… datase… #> 10 <a href=https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/… EuSt… Dail… Datase… datase… #> # ℹ 218 more rows  knitr::kable(head(linked))

what: Create a data.frame with documentation metadata of one or more packages — document_universe
title: Create a data.frame with documentation metadata of one or more packages — document_universe
text: Create data.frame documentation metadata one packages. develop universe, tidyverse tidymodels, dverse helps easily create universe-wide reference pkgdown website meta-package.

title: Create a data.frame with documentation metadata of one or more packages — document_universe
code: document_universe(   x,   url_template = NULL,   url = NULL,   packages = NULL,   strip_s3class = TRUE )

title: Create a data.frame with documentation metadata of one or more packages — document_universe
text: x character vector giving concepts package names match. url_template Character. template generate links documentation based column names output – typically package topic, e.g. "https://maurolepore.github.io/{package}/reference/{topic}.html" (glue::glue() syntax). url Character vector length-1 giving base url, e.g. "https://maurolepore.github.io/". packages character vector names packages limit search, NULL serach known libraries. strip_s3class TRUE removes class component S3 methods.

title: Create a data.frame with documentation metadata of one or more packages — document_universe
text: dataframe.
